title: Observability Stack Pattern
description: Enforces all three observability pillars: metrics (Prometheus + Grafana), distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry + Jaeger), and structured logging (Logstash + Elasticsearch + Kibana). Every service must emit all three.

book-references: Cloud Native Patterns Ch. 12 — Distributed Tracing & Log Aggregation

nodes.name: Observed Service
nodes.description: Application service instrumented with metrics, tracing, and structured logging. Exposes /actuator/prometheus and propagates trace context.

nodes.name: Metrics Collector
nodes.description: Prometheus scrapes /actuator/prometheus endpoint at configurable intervals for time-series metrics.

nodes.name: Metrics Dashboard
nodes.description: Grafana dashboards for visualizing metrics, SLIs, and alerting.

nodes.name: Trace Collector
nodes.description: Jaeger collects distributed traces via OTLP protocol. Visualizes request flow across service boundaries.

nodes.name: Log Pipeline
nodes.description: Logstash receives structured JSON logs via TCP, transforms and forwards to storage.

nodes.name: Log Storage
nodes.description: Elasticsearch indexes structured log entries for full-text search and aggregation.

nodes.name: Log Dashboard
nodes.description: Kibana provides log search, visualization, and alerting on structured log data.

relationships.description: Grafana queries Prometheus for time-series data
Service exports traces via OpenTelemetry OTLP exporter
Structured JSON logs sent to Logstash via TCP appender
Kibana queries Elasticsearch for log visualization

constraints.description: Every observed service must emit metrics, traces, AND structured logs. Missing any pillar is a governance violation.
Every handler must set MDC context (endorsementId, employerId) at entry and clear in finally block.
Every domain operation must record metrics: Timer for durations, Counter for events/errors, Gauge for current state.
Log messages must include correlation context: traceId, spanId, requestId, endorsementId, employerId via MDC.
Metric names follow endorsement.{domain}.{action} pattern with tags for dimensions. Tags over separate metric names.
